title: What To Make Of D.R. Horton's All-Time High?
text: D.R. Horton has outperformed the market with a 44% return over the past year, driven by low interest rates and reduced construction costs due to lower lumber prices. As the largest homebuilder in the US, D.R. Horton benefits from these trends and has a strong balance sheet, liquidity, and ability to navigate changing market conditions. However, potential risks in the housing market and the company's current valuation suggest caution, with a potential buying opportunity if unemployment rises and the Fed is forced to cut rates.
